mentions.note: 151-year-old with 60% recurring (repair/replacement) revenue. Liquid cooling hardware demand surging as data centers shift from air cooling; provides cooling valves, backflow preventers, strainers, water quality products. 22 acquisitions in 12 years (1+1=3 model), disciplined on commoditized product exits. Data center customers busy booking 3-year pipelines. Up 55% past 12 months, 20% YTD. Own it, don't trade it.
